notes: Demo-readiness pass — robustness for board-on-new-VLAN scenarios. T_REDISCOVER 5min → 30s: when Sonos becomes unreachable (cached IP stale on new VLAN, transient outage, Sonos reboot), the board re-runs SSDP and re-matches by name within 30s instead of sitting unreachable for 5 min. ui-preview/serve.py: /api/rotnet/reset now zeros rotationFine too — matches firmware. docs/DEMO_READINESS.md + docs/OFF_POE_PLAN.md written. Captured hardware reality: Unit PoE-P4 module has no WiFi, no BLE, no C6 coprocessor — SoftAP / ESP-NOW fallback isn't implementable on this board; venue must provide Ethernet.
